text:
{"fixed_xml":"<ITEM>In der Hoch-Obrigkeitl. Buchtruckerey zu Bern und folgende Bücher in gar geringem Preiß zu haben, als: 1. <BIBL><AUTHOR>J. H Ringieri</AUTHOR> <TITLE>CX. Conciones de Ccena Dominic.</TITLE> <VOLUME>3. Vol.</VOLUME> <FORMAT>4to.</FORMAT> <PLACE>Bern.</PLACE> <YEAR>1680</YEAR>. das Eremplar in albo achthalben <PRIZE>bz.</PRIZE></BIBL> 2. <BIBL><AUTHOR>Rissenii</AUTHOR> <TITLE>Summa Theolog.</TITLE> <FORMAT>in 8vo.</FORMAT> <PLACE>Bern.</PLACE> <YEAR>1703</YEAR>. à <PRIZE>10. Batzen,</PRIZE> und auff Schreib-papier <PRIZE>14. Batzen.</PRIZE></BIBL> 3. <BIBL><AUTHOR>Rodolphi</AUTHOR> <TITLE>Compend. Theol. Christ</TITLE> <FORMAT>8vo.</FORMAT> <PLACE>Bern</PLACE> <YEAR>1713</YEAR>. à <PRIZE>8 Batzen.</PRIZE></BIBL> 4. <BIBL><AUTHOR>Altmanns</AUTHOR> <TITLE>Carechetischer Leuchter und Rauchwerck, d. i. Erklärung und Gebatt über den Heydelbergischen Catechismum,</TITLE> <FORMAT>8vo.</FORMAT> <PLACE>Bern,</PLACE> <YEAR>1711</YEAR>. mit dem Kupffer-Btatt haltet <PRIZE>15. und ein halben Bogen,</PRIZE> à <PRIZE>5. Batzen.</PRIZE></BIBL> 5. <BIBL><TITLE>Biblia Piscatoris</TITLE> <FORMAT>in 4to.</FORMAT> <PLACE>Rein,</PLACE> à <PRIZE>15. Batzen.</PRIZE></BIBL> 6. <BIBL><AUTHOR>Seelmatters</AUTHOR> <TITLE>Ewig- vest-bestehender Berg Zion, oder: der vest-gegrundete unüberwindliche Gnaden-Stand der Kinderen GOttes,</TITLE> gründlich vorgestellt über die Worte des 125. Pfalms <FORMAT>9. 1.</FORMAT> <FORMAT>8vo.</FORMAT> <PLACE>Bern.</PLACE> <YEAR>1704</YEAR>. à <PRIZE>5. Batzen.</PRIZE></BIBL></ITEM>","number_of_corrections":9,"explanation":"The following corrections were made:
1. √ü → ü (Bücher): Garbled Unicode escape sequence corrected to proper umlaut ü.
2. √ü → ß (Preiß): Garbled Unicode escape sequence corrected to ß (sharp s).
3. √† → à (three occurrences in items 2, 3, 4, 5, 6): The garbled sequence √† was corrected to the preposition 'à' (meaning 'at [a price of]'), which is the standard abbreviation used in historical price listings.
4. √ü → ü (Leuchter): Garbled Unicode corrected to ü.
5. √§ → ä (Erklärung): Garbled Unicode corrected to ä.
6. √ü → ü (über, item 4): Garbled Unicode corrected to ü.
7. √ü → ü (unüberwindliche): Garbled Unicode corrected to ü.
8. √ü → ü (gründlich): Garbled Unicode corrected to ü.
9. </PRICE> → </PRIZE> (closing tag of last BIBL item 6): Mismatched closing tag corrected from PRICE to PRIZE to match the opening tag."}

parsed.explanation:
The following corrections were made:
1. √ü → ü (Bücher): Garbled Unicode escape sequence corrected to proper umlaut ü.
2. √ü → ß (Preiß): Garbled Unicode escape sequence corrected to ß (sharp s).
3. √† → à (three occurrences in items 2, 3, 4, 5, 6): The garbled sequence √† was corrected to the preposition 'à' (meaning 'at [a price of]'), which is the standard abbreviation used in historical price listings.
4. √ü → ü (Leuchter): Garbled Unicode corrected to ü.
5. √§ → ä (Erklärung): Garbled Unicode corrected to ä.
6. √ü → ü (über, item 4): Garbled Unicode corrected to ü.
7. √ü → ü (unüberwindliche): Garbled Unicode corrected to ü.
8. √ü → ü (gründlich): Garbled Unicode corrected to ü.
9. </PRICE> → </PRIZE> (closing tag of last BIBL item 6): Mismatched closing tag corrected from PRICE to PRIZE to match the opening tag.
